title: lasianthus marginatus
intro: Lasianthus marginatus, also known as the Chinese wild tea, is a type of flowering plant native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lasianthus marginatus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and soothe digestive issues. The plant is often prepared as a tea by steeping the leaves in hot water or as a tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
